title: Occupational Therapy (OT)
shortDescription: Helping children gain independence in daily life through fine motor skills, sensory processing, and self-care routines.
description: Our occupational therapy program, led by Dr. Bhuvanesh R, focuses on helping children gain independence in their daily lives. We work on fine motor skills, sensory processing, hand-eye coordination, and self-care routines through engaging, play-based sessions tailored to each child's needs.

title: Speech & Language Therapy
shortDescription: Building communication skills, articulation, and language comprehension through fun, engaging sessions.
description: Our speech therapy program focuses on helping children express themselves clearly and confidently. We create fun, engaging sessions to build vital communication skills including articulation, language comprehension, fluency, and social communication.

title: School Readiness Program
shortDescription: Preparing children for mainstream school through structured learning, social skills, and classroom readiness.
description: Our signature School Readiness Program bridges the gap between home and the structured school environment. We focus on the holistic needs of every child — from imitation and observational learning to pre-academic skills and emotional regulation — across three progressive levels.

title: Behavioral Therapy
shortDescription: Evidence-based strategies to manage challenging behaviors and build positive habits for children.
description: Our behavioral therapy uses evidence-based approaches to help children manage challenging behaviors and develop positive habits. We work closely with parents to create consistent strategies that can be applied at home, school, and in the community.

title: Special Education
shortDescription: Individualized learning strategies that bridge learning gaps and build academic confidence.
description: Our special educators work one-on-one with children to bridge learning gaps using individualized strategies that move beyond standard classroom methods. Each child receives a personalized Individualized Education Plan (IEP) designed to support their unique learning profile.

title: Physiotherapy
shortDescription: Improving movement, strength, balance, and coordination through targeted physical therapy.
description: Our physiotherapy services focus on improving children's gross motor skills, strength, balance, and overall physical coordination. Through structured exercises and play-based activities, we help children achieve physical milestones and improve their confidence in movement.

title: Sensory Integration
shortDescription: Helping children process and respond to sensory input for better focus, calm, and participation.
description: Sensory integration therapy helps children who have difficulty processing sensory information from their environment. Through structured sensory activities, we help children improve their ability to focus, stay calm, and participate meaningfully in everyday activities.

title: Early Intervention
shortDescription: Targeted support for infants and toddlers to address developmental delays as early as possible.
description: Our early intervention program provides targeted support for infants and toddlers (0-3 years) showing developmental delays. Early identification and intervention can significantly improve outcomes, and we work hand-in-hand with parents to support their child's growth during these critical early years.
